title: On A Suicide.
content:
Earth'd up here lies an imp o' hell,
            Planted by Satan's dibble,
        Poor silly wretch, he's damn'd himsel'
            To save the Lord the trouble.
meaning:
"On A Suicide." is a quintessential example of Robert Burns's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
